principal_loads: RP2040 flash PHY IO and filtered FPGA IO-bank islands
operating_constraint: digital region with solid In1 return

principal_loads: filtered CrossLink core/GPLL islands and KSZ9031 core
operating_constraint: unused CrossLink DPHY analog/PLL supplies intentionally unpowered

principal_loads: CrossLink VCC balls E4 and E6
operating_constraint: 10 uF bulk and one 100 nF at each VCC ball
2.2 uF bulk and one 100 nF at each VCCIO1 ball
2.2 uF bulk and one 100 nF at each VCCIO2 ball
10 uF bulk and one 100 nF at each AVDDH pin
10 uF bulk and one 100 nF at each AVDDL pin
10 uF plus 100 nF and 10 nF local bypassing
120 ohm at 100 MHz ferrite plus 1 uF at CrossLink VCCAUX

principal_loads: LMX2592 ADF4360 LTC5548 selected LNAs AD9215 clocks RF controls
operating_constraint: enable only the selected RF path and use exposed-pad thermal copper
